summary: Complete testing of Role Approval Workflow feature. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified. Registration creates pending status for auteur/agent roles. Admin notification endpoints work correctly. Approve/reject actions function properly.

issues: Console hydration warning about <span> inside <option> and <select> - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

backend_registration_flow: POST /api/auth/register as visiteur creates status='actif' immediately
POST /api/auth/register as auteur creates status='pending', role='visiteur'
POST /api/auth/register as agent creates status='pending', role='visiteur'
POST /api/auth/register as admin returns 422 (validation blocks admin role)
backend_admin_notifications: GET /api/admin/notifications returns paginated list with notifications, total, pending_count, page, pages
backend_role_actions: PUT /api/admin/notifications/{id}/action with approve grants requested role and activates user
PUT /api/admin/notifications/{id}/action with reject keeps visiteur role but activates user
frontend_login_page: Login page shows 3 role options: Visiteur, Auteur, Agent
Info message 'validation par l'administrateur' shown when auteur/agent selected
frontend_admin_header: Bell icon (notification) appears for admin users
Badge with pending count shows on bell icon
frontend_admin_database: Demandes tab appears first in admin database page
Pending badge shows count on Demandes tab
Pending requests banner shows '6 demandes en attente d'approbation'
Status filter dropdown works (Tous, En attente, Approuvé, Rejeté)
Pending notifications show APPROUVER and REJETER buttons
Approved/rejected notifications do not show action buttons
Role labels display correctly (AUTEUR, AGENT IMMOBILIER)
frontend_profile_page: Pending user sees amber status banner 'Compte en attente de validation'
Toast notification confirms pending status on login

critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning: Hydration error about <span> child of <option> in select dropdowns - this is from the editor wrapper, not breaking functionality
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during testing (TEST_Visiteur_*, TEST_Auteur_*, TEST_Agent_*, TEST_ApproveUser_*, TEST_RejectUser_*, TEST_ProcessedUser_*, TEST_NonAdmin_*, TEST_PendingUI_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role approval workflow fully tested and working. Admin notifications endpoints at /api/admin/notifications/* are functional. SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL is matrixguinea@gmail.com hardcoded in server.py. Previous admin account admin@example.com does not have super admin privileges.
